source_pr.title: *: update tikv/client-go to improve failpoint performance issue
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: disksing <i@disksing.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?

Update `tikv/client-go` to resolve failpoint performance issue.

### What's changed

- update client-go
- for test packages that need failpoints in client-go, enable it in `TestingT`
- in `main.go`, when `enableTestAPI` is true, enable failpoints of client-go.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->
- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->
- No release note

symptoms: + // It appears in the main function to be set before any use of client-go to prevent data race.
failure_signature: + // It appears in the main function to be set before any use of client-go to prevent data race.
fix_pattern: + // It appears in the main function to be set before any use of client-go to prevent data race.

evidence: evidence: + // It appears in the main function to be set before any use of client-go to prevent data race.

files: ddl/ddl_test.go, executor/executor_test.go, expression/evaluator_test.go, go.mod, go.sum, server/server_test.go, session/tidb_test.go, store/driver/util_test.go, store/gcworker/gc_worker_test.go, tidb-server/main.go
